This short series are live training calls I conducted introducing students to the foundations
and testing setup phase plus product testing using the course material. Use this as an
overview to support your overall approach.
Part 1 - Foundations, Testing & Setup
Video 1 covers why the foundations are so important and how to approach this part of the
training.
VIDEO 1
Part 2 - Product Level Testing & Funnels
Part 2 focusses on product level testing using the 4-Funnel system and Graduation Testing.
VIDEO 2
